use_cases: Landing page headers for SaaS products or component libraries
Marketing pages showcasing product features with social proof
Hero sections with CTA buttons and trust indicators for new visitors
Product launch pages with review/avatar trust elements
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist marketing hero component featuring a large headline, descriptive text, prominent CTA button, and social proof section with stacked user avatars. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components. Fully responsive with mobile-first flexbox layout that adapts from mobile to desktop viewport.
